hero.headline: The painters *your neighbors* already trust
hero.subheadline: 4.7 stars across 79 reviews. When Brandon and his crew finish, you'll see why Columbia keeps calling us back.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Interior, exterior, repairs — handled right
services_section.subheading: From drywall fixes to full home makeovers, we prep thoroughly and paint to last

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Room by room or whole-house transformations. Meticulous prep work and clean lines that make the difference show.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.description: Houses, fences, shutters, trim — pressure washed, prepped, and painted to weather Columbia's seasons.

services.title: Drywall Repair
services.description: Holes, cracks, and damage disappear. We patch, sand, and paint until walls look brand new again.

services.title: Deck & Fence Staining
services.description: Pressure washing followed by proper staining. Your outdoor spaces ready for cookouts and curb appeal.

services.title: Trim & Detail Work
services.description: Doors, shutters, columns — the finishing touches that make your whole house look professionally done.

about.heading: Brandon, Benson, and the crew Columbia calls first
about.body: When you see our work truck around Columbia neighborhoods, there's a reason. We've built our reputation one project at a time — thorough prep work, attention to detail, and going the extra mile even when we don't have to. Whether it's fixing drywall holes or painting entire home exteriors, we take pride in work that lasts. That's why neighbors recommend us to neighbors.

reviews.name: Keyasha C.
reviews.text: Brandon repaired my drywall hole and went beyond what I expected. Fast, professional, and you can tell he takes real pride in his work. Wall looks brand new!

reviews.name: Dave D.
reviews.text: Benson and crew painted our arbor, then went above and beyond painting columns and front bump-out at no charge. The whole front looks amazing!

reviews.name: Dee D.
reviews.text: Brandan painted shutters, front door and trim — even installed new door hardware. Great communication, showed up on time, very thorough with prep and cleanup.

reviews.name: Melissa J.
reviews.text: Saw their truck and grabbed the contact info — so glad I did! Professional, responsive, pressure washed then completed perfect work. Deck is ready for summer!

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Columbia and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional painting services throughout the Midlands

cta.heading: Ready to see the BB's difference?
cta.body: Join 79+ happy homeowners who've experienced our attention to detail. Free estimates, thorough prep work, and results that last.
